title: Alive Well
description: Difficult survival mod specifically designed for the modpack 'Dangerous World'
body: 中文: 注意: 该模组专为整合包《危险世界求生》（DangerousWorld）服务，单独无法正常使用。 整合包链接:DangerousWorld. Attention: This mod is specifically designed for the modpack "Dangerous World" and cannot be used normally on its own. The Modpack DangerousWorld. 一、主要内容 1.玩家初始饱食度为3颗心；默认50条生命，可通过重生石增加（可在配置文件aliveandewell.json中修改最大60条生命。 2.无法空手撸树，挖沙砾获取燧石和铜粒，燧石右键石头获得燧石碎片，合成燧石锭做出燧石镐挖石头；制作燧石工作台、铜工作台等等工作台，合成铜镐可以挖铜矿。只有工作台和附魔台可以越级合成。 3.满饱食度无法恢复血量，躺床加速回血。 4.怪物基础属性逐渐增强，可拾取掉落物，地狱猪人主动攻击玩家，并穿戴玩家装备； 有几率生成穿戴装备的僵尸、骷髅。 5.玩家右击一颗钻石、青金石、红石和石英得经验。 6.无法作弊，默认困难生存。 7.掉落物清理时间更改为15分钟，玩家死亡后的物品不会像原版那样很快消失。 8.玩家只能在晚上21点到3点之间睡着。 9.玩家挖掘方块的速度很慢，避免一味地挖挖挖就可以无敌了。 10.禁用地狱门，添加新的传送门（用【紫水晶块】搭建，用传送门打火石点燃）， 主世界只能在负35层以下放置，可前往新的维度“地下世界”。 在地下世界负35层以下用【紫水晶母岩】搭建传送门，可前往地狱维度。 用出生点传送门框架搭建传送门可返回该维度的出生点。 用随机门框架（秘银或艾德曼）搭建传送门，并在四个角放置四个不同的秘银或艾德曼符文石，可在该维度随机传送。 11.合成物品需要消耗时间，不用等级工作台合成速度不同， 由低到高为燧石工作台、铜工作台、铁工作台、钻石工作台、下届合金工作台。 以及不同等级的熔炉：粘土熔炉、熔炉、高炉、黑曜石熔炉、地狱岩熔炉。 12.武器装备拥有副属性： 武器： 击晕：给敌人增加缓慢效果。 凋零：有几率使敌人凋零 致命一击：有几率根据敌人的最大生命值造成额外的伤害。 嘲讽：有几率削弱敌人 吸血：有几率造成伤害恢复玩家血量。 盔甲： 保护：伤害减免 坚定：亡灵生物伤害减免 毒刺：在短时间内使敌人中毒 振奋：生命值低时，玩家有几率获得抗性 坚毅不催：有几率抵消所有伤害 13.玩家经验等级越高，拥有的经验点数越多，饱食度、合成速度、挖掘速度越高。 14.附魔台消耗玩家经验点数而不是等级，最高24个书架，10000经验魔。 15.附魔金苹果和附魔金胡罗卜可在附魔台附魔获得。 16.传送指令：sethome、home、setback、back、tpa、tpahere等，需消耗经验。 二、一些说明 作者本人是一个业余爱好者，水平有限，出于对MITE模组的热爱，参考了很多开源模组，以及加入了自己的一些想法，才有了这个模组，但是这个模组目前只适用整合包《危险世界求生》，不可单独使用（为了保持整合包的难度不被改变）。 如有什么不合适的地方，请联系我及时更改。 English: First: Main content 1. The player's initial satiety is 3 hearts; By default, there are 50 lives that can be increased through the Rebirth Stone (a maximum of 60 lives can be modified in the configuration file aliveandewell.json). 2. Unable to climb trees with bare hands, dig sand and gravel to obtain flint and copper particles, right-click on the stone to obtain flint fragments, synthesize flint ingots to make flint picks to dig stones; Making flint workbenches, copper workbenches, and other workbenches, synthetic copper picks can be used to excavate copper ore.Only workbenches and enchanting tables can be synthesized at a higher level. 3. Full satiety cannot restore health, lying in bed accelerates recovery. 4. The basic attributes of the monster gradually increase, and it can pick up dropped objects. The Hell Pig Man actively attacks the player and wears player equipment; There is a chance to generate zombies and skeletons wearing equipment. 5. Players right click on a diamond, lapis lazuli, redstone, and quartz to gain experience. 6. Unable to cheat, default difficulty in survival. 7. The drop cleaning time has been changed to 15 minutes, and items that die after the player will not disappear as quickly as the original version. 8. Players can only fall asleep between 21:00 and 3pm at night. 9. The speed of players digging blocks is very slow, so avoiding blindly digging and digging can make them invincible. 10. Disable Hell's Gate and add a new Portal (built with [Amethyst Block] and ignited with a Firestone using the Portal), The main world can only be placed below -35 floors, and you can go to the new dimension 'Underground World'. Build a portal with Amethyst Mother Rock below the negative 35th floor of the underground world, and you can travel to the Hell dimension. Using the birth point portal framework to build a portal can return the birth point of that dimension. Build a portal using a random gate framework (Secret Silver or Edelman) and place four different Secret Silver or Edelman runes at the four corners to randomly teleport in that dimension. 11. Synthesizing items requires time, and the synthesis speed varies depending on the level of the workbench. From low to high, they are flint workbench, copper workbench, iron workbench, diamond workbench, and the next alloy workbench. And different levels of furnaces: clay furnaces, furnaces, blast furnaces, obsidian furnaces, and hellrock furnaces. 12. Weapons and equipment have secondary attributes: Weapon: Stun: Increases the slow effect on enemies. Fading: There is a chance to make enemies wither Deadly Strike: There is a chance to deal additional damage based on the enemy's maximum health. Mockery: has a chance to weaken enemies Vampire: There is a chance to deal damage and restore player health. Armor: Protection: Damage reduction Firm: Undead creature damage reduction Poison Sting: Poisons enemies in a short period of time Inspiration: When health is low, players have a chance to gain resistance Perseverance and perseverance: There is a chance to offset all damage 13. The higher the player's experience level, the more experience points they have, and the higher their satiety, synthesis speed, and mining speed. 14. Enchantment Table consumes player experience points instead of level, with a maximum of 24 bookshelves and 10000 experience demons. 15. Enchanted Golden Apple and Enchanted Golden Carrot can be obtained by enchanting on the Enchanting Table. 16. Transfer instructions: sethome, home, setback, back, tpa, tpahere, etc., which require experience consumption. Second: Some explanations Thank Avernite's Minecraft is too easy 1.6.4 and Kelvin's MITE-reborn 1.16.4! The author myself is an amateur with limited skills. Out of his love for the MITE mod, I referred to many open source modules and added some of his own ideas, which led to the creation of this mod. However, this mod is currently only applicable to the modpack "Survival in the Dangerous World" and cannot be used alone (to maintain the difficulty of the modpack unchanged). If there are any inappropriate areas, please contact me to make timely changes.
